releases.label: FIRST Final Catalog (14Dec17)
releases.summary: Final FIRST 1.4 GHz catalog — 946,432 sources over ~10,575 deg2 (8,444 deg2 north Galactic cap + 2,131 deg2 south); elliptical-Gaussian fits with SDSS DR10 and 2MASS counterpart matches

releases.label: VLASS Epochs 1-3 Quick Look
releases.summary: VLASS quick-look images and component catalogs complete for all three full epochs (1.1-3.2) plus pilot, covering 33,885 deg2 (dec > -40); median-stacked quicklook images from the three epochs provide deeper combined data with fewer artifacts

releases.label: VLASS Epoch 4.1 Quick Look
releases.summary: Quick-look imaging for partial Epoch 4.1 complete 2026-05-07 with component catalog at the NRAO archive; a 4th epoch for half the sky that will replace VLASS 1.1 data affected by antenna pointing issues
